title: Wireless devices, systems and methods for object tracking
abstract: A tracking system and a method of tracking an object. Wireless signal communication between a central processing unit, a device and numerous wireless transmitters allows the tracking system to provide tracking information through different communication modalities. In one form, the communication is between the device and a first of the wireless transmitters or between the device and one more second wireless transmitters when the device is within BluetoothÂ® Low Energy wireless signal communication range. Likewise, the communication is between the device and one or more of the first wireless transmitter, the second wireless transmitters or the central processing unit over one of numerous other wireless communication technologies when the device is beyond BluetoothÂ® Low Energy wireless signal communication range of the first and second wireless transmitters. Additionally, some of the wireless transmitters may form either direct or indirect wireless signal communication with one another. Other components, such as smartphones or related mobile computing devices, may be included in the tracking system.
claims: 1. A tracking system comprising: a central processing unit; a device comprising a processor, an antenna and a device identifier; a first wireless transmitter configured to be in wireless signal communication with the central processing unit; and a plurality of second wireless transmitters configured to be in wireless signal communication with one another through at least a communication chain, wherein at least one of the plurality of second wireless transmitters is further configured to be in wireless signal communication with the central processing unit, the tracking system configured to provide tracking information through wireless signal communication between (i) the device and, over a Bluetooth® Low Energy wireless communication technology, the first wireless transmitter or at least one of the plurality of second wireless transmitters when the device is within wireless signal communication range therewith, (ii) the device and, over at least one of a plurality of other wireless communication technologies, at least one of: the first wireless transmitter when the device is not within wireless signal communication range of the first wireless transmitter over the Bluetooth® Low Energy wireless communication technology; at least one of the plurality of second wireless transmitters when the device is not within wireless signal communication range of any of the plurality of second wireless transmitters over the Bluetooth® Low Energy wireless communication technology; or the central processing unit when the device is not within wireless signal communication range of the first wireless transmitter the over the Bluetooth® Low Energy wireless communication technology or any of the plurality of second wireless transmitters over the Bluetooth® Low Energy wireless communication technology.
